title: polygala major var. major
intro: Polygala major var. major, also known as European milkwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the milkwort family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala major var. major include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Polygala major var. major include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
